geography.data_source: MCGM ward boundaries (H/East, H/West wards mapped to numeric IDs); area from MCGM Development Plan 2034

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 H-ward Mumbai suburban district; density = population/area; household size from NSSO 76th Round Mumbai upper-mid income estimates; literacy from Census 2011; SC/ST from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: Median from PLFS 2022-23 upper-income Mumbai urban adjusted for Bandra West property price index as proxy; distribution right-skewed but less extreme than South Mumbai due to Bandra East lower-income pockets; informal rate from NSSO 78th Round; occupations reflect Bollywood/media presence, BKC tech offices, Linking Road retail

commute_profile.data_source: MCTS 2016 mode share for H-ward TAZs; Bandra station is a major Western Railway junction; metro lines from MMRDA alignment plans; car ownership from Census 2011 adjusted for post-2011 income growth

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Low fare sensitivity for high-income zone; very high diffusion speed reflecting media industry concentration and high digital literacy; institutional trust from Lokniti-CSDS 2024; political mobilisation from Bandra West Assembly constituency data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Moderate connections reflecting mix of apartment and bungalow living; cross-income bridging higher due to BKC office district drawing workers from diverse zones; tier2 density elevated due to media/journalist concentration

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Linking Road is one of Mumbai's busiest street shopping destinations; footfall from MCGM pedestrian survey 2019 and BEST ridership at Linking Road bus stop
Hill Road commercial stretch; MCGM trade license data for H-West ward
Vendors near Bandra station east exit; footfall from Western Railway Bandra station boarding data ~500K daily
Informal food and service economy serving BKC office district; estimated from BKC working population (~200K) and lunch-hour pedestrian patterns

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: High Income/Professional template from AGENT_SPEC.md adjusted: tech_knowledge_worker reduced from 0.38 to 0.32 (less pure IT corridor than South Mumbai), formal_sector increased, journalist raised to 0.02 reflecting media industry presence; daily_wage_worker added at 0.02 for Bandra East construction activity

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts reflecting Bandra's media industry concentration (Bollywood, TV), BKC corporate presence, Mt. Mary/Bandra church community leadership
